family_title: runtime bridge, doctor readiness, observability, and paused-work recovery

out_of_scope: recent-project selection beyond the bounded picker window
scope.authority_source: Phase 15 exploration report, execution brief, and the fixed F5 code changes already landed in the worktree.

cases.name: runtime_bridge_rejection
preconditions: manifest is missing install_scope or declares a mismatched runtime
bridge command is invoked with a local install scope
cases.expected_before_fix: bridge rejection should be typed as a stable internal kind instead of being just opaque stderr
cases.observed_before_fix: bridge rejection text was the only stable surface before F5
assertions: missing install scope classifies as MISSING_INSTALL_SCOPE

cases.name: doctor_local_first_readiness
preconditions: runtime detection reports a global install target
cases.expected_before_fix: doctor could silently adopt detected global install scope
cases.observed_before_fix: local-first defaulting was not guaranteed before the F5 fix
assertions: run_doctor receives the local target dir resolved from the current workspace

cases.name: observability_degraded_visibility
preconditions: current-execution.json or execution-head.json is malformed or incomplete
cases.expected_before_fix: partial telemetry should not collapse to plain idle/none
cases.observed_before_fix: observability degraded too quietly before the F5 fix
assertions: visibility_mode is snapshot-only, trace-only, or degraded
follow-up commands stay conservative and do not overpromise session-scoped inspection

cases.name: paused_work_priority
cases.expected_before_fix: set-conventions could crowd out resume on paused work
cases.observed_before_fix: paused-work suggestion ordering was not guaranteed before the F5 fix
assertions: missing_conventions stays empty while paused work is still asking for resume

exact_fix.fix_summary: F5 now has stable bridge failure kinds, local-first doctor target resolution, degraded observability modes, and paused-work suggestion ordering that keeps resume first.
exact_fix.green_command: uv run pytest -q tests/test_bug_runtime_recovery_contract.py tests/test_runtime_cli_bridge_errors.py tests/core/test_health.py tests/core/test_observability.py tests/core/test_suggest.py tests/test_cli_integration.py
exact_fix.expected_after_fix: The runtime recovery surfaces agree on structured failure typing, readiness typing, degraded visibility, and resume precedence.
exact_fix.actual_after_fix: Verified green by the lane-6 contract file and the existing F5 regression suites.

adjacent_checks.why_it_matters: The bridge must still forward valid invocations unchanged after typed failure classification.
Runtime readiness must stay local-first when no scope or target is explicit.

adjacent_checks.test_command: uv run pytest -q tests/core/test_observability.py -k 'snapshot_only or trace_only or degraded_visibility'
adjacent_checks.why_it_matters: Partial telemetry must remain explicit and conservative.
Paused work must tell the user to resume before convention cleanup.

logs: uv run pytest -q tests/test_runtime_cli_bridge_errors.py tests/core/test_health.py tests/core/test_observability.py tests/core/test_suggest.py tests/test_cli_integration.py

red_exact_repro.assertion: Bridge rejection kinds, local-first doctor resolution, degraded visibility, and paused-work precedence are all explicitly asserted.

green_exact_fix.assertion: The contract file passes against the already-landed F5 fixes.

green_adjacent_checks.command: uv run pytest -q tests/test_runtime_cli_bridge_errors.py tests/core/test_health.py tests/core/test_observability.py tests/core/test_suggest.py tests/test_cli_integration.py
green_adjacent_checks.assertion: Adjacent runtime, doctor, observability, and suggestion regressions stayed green.

notes: The observability and doctor contract cases intentionally use synthetic temp workspaces where the bundle does not have a clean native packet.
The paused-work suggestion check is an adjacent verification gate, not a new family.
This artifact records the verified F5 runtime-recovery contract after the code fixes were already integrated.
Lane 6 revalidated the owned contract file with `uv run pytest -q tests/test_bug_runtime_recovery_contract.py` and `uv run ruff check tests/test_bug_runtime_recovery_contract.py`.
